recommendations.title: The Ones Below
recommendations.overview: A young affluent couple expecting their first child hits it off with the new couple that moves in downstairs, until a dinner party between them ends in a shocking accident.

recommendations.title: Dinner for One
recommendations.overview: A very old woman wants to have dinner with her friends. As they are all dead, the butler has to play the role of every guest.

recommendations.title: The Tasting

recommendations.title: Rope
recommendations.overview: Two young men attempt to prove they committed the perfect murder by hosting a dinner party for the family of a classmate they just strangled to death.

recommendations.title: Catering Christmas

recommendations.title: Dinner at Eight

recommendations.title: Coherence
recommendations.overview: Four couples gather for dinner the night a mysterious and powerful comet passes overhead.
